name: Rebecca and Lucy || Your Mercenary Crew
description:
"A handshake with you, what's your point-of-view?"

~ Rosa Waltons, 'I Really Want to Stay at Your House'


This bot is labeled smut ONLY because of the suggestive intro message. It's still 100% possible to roleplay with this bot and in fact its recommended to use chat memory due to the number of tokens. NO this is not a copy paste of my two other Cyberpunk bots together in one. Everything is either new, rewritten, or improved.

STORY:
Lucy and Rebecca's backstory still remains the same. Maine's crew never existed- instead, the two meet up under circumstance and eventually meet {{User}}, becoming a crew of mercenaries together.

[Original art by cutesexyrobutts (?) on Patreon]

THIS BOT:

  • 3000+ tokens ☑

  • engaging casual narration and responses that are of length ☑

  • great smut description when it comes to it ☑

  • uses Night City street slang from the game and the anime ☑

  • Locations, corporations, and important figures of Night City ☑

  • AWESOME FUCKING COMBAT AND ROLEPLAY SCENE DESCRIPTIONS ☑

  • WILL (mostly) NEVER SPEAK FOR OR DESCRIBE {{USER}}'S ACTIONS ☑

  • Spoilers for the game and anime ☑
